name: skillops-local
description: A local-first Skill and MCP capability workbench for secure AI agent operations.
author: yunpai

scripts.desktop:pack:all: npm run wails:bump-version && npm run wails:pack:mac-m4:build && npm run wails:pack:win:build
scripts.desktop:package:mac: npm run wails:pack:mac-m4 && npm run desktop:package:mac:installer
scripts.publish:prepare: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.publish:cli: npm run publish:prepare && npm publish --access public
scripts.wails:dev: npm run wails:prepare && node scripts/run-wails.cjs dev
scripts.wails:pack:mac-m4:build: npm run wails:prepare && npm run wails:frontend:build && node scripts/run-wails.cjs build -clean -s -platform darwin/arm64 -o SkillOpsLocal
scripts.wails:pack:win:build: npm run wails:prepare && npm run wails:frontend:build && node scripts/run-wails.cjs build -clean -s -platform windows/amd64 -o SkillOpsLocal
scripts.wails:pack:mac-m4: npm run wails:bump-version && npm run wails:pack:mac-m4:build
scripts.wails:pack:win: npm run wails:bump-version && npm run wails:pack:win:build
scripts.wails:prepare: npm run wails:sync-version && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-wails.cjs
